summary: COMPARISON layout: input z-plane (left) and output z²-plane (right). ValueTracker θ sweeps 0→2π; z = 1.5·e^(iθ) on the input circle, z² traces the output circle of radius 2.25 — going around TWICE per full input revolution. Persistent yellow trail records every visited z². Bottom strip shows live θ, 2θ, |z|, |z²|.
